name: contour
description: Color zones continuously by a scalar/vector/tensor field attribute. Validated against 'plot item create zone contour ?' in FLAC2D 9.0.
examples: plot item create zone contour displacement legend active on
plot item create zone contour stress-xx legend active on
plot item create zone contour pore-pressure
plot item create zone contour ratio-local
plot item create zone contour extra index 1
plot item create zone contour property name "young"
notes: 'displacement', 'velocity', 'unbalanced-force', 'acceleration' are vector magnitudes by default; suffix '-x' / '-y' for components (FLAC2D).
'stress', 'strain-rate', 'strain-increment' are tensors with magnitude as default; suffix '-xx/-yy/-zz/-xy' for components.
'extra' selects the extra slot: 'contour extra index <n>'.
'property' selects a named zone property: 'contour property name "young"'.
Probe sub-keywords via 'plot item create zone contour <attribute> ?'.
